response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer, but he is not a C++ developer, which is the central requirement of this role. His only professional C++ experience was for a short period over 20 years ago, and his skills and projects are heavily focused on Dlang, TypeScript, and Node.js. Furthermore, he shows no experience with the required industrial security standards like IEC 62443. Despite his strong architectural skills, the fundamental mismatch in core technology makes him unsuitable for this position.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior/staff engineer building complex, high-performance systems.
Strong background in microservices, asynchronous I/O, and event-driven architectures.
Experience in relevant domains, including a role at National Instruments and work with robotic arms.
concerns: Virtually no recent or significant C++ experience; the core requirement for the role is completely unmet.
No mention of experience with required security standards like SDL or IEC 62443.
Primary expertise is in Dlang and web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript), not C++.
